scripts.build:packages: npm run build -w packages/shared && npm run build -w packages/claude-md-generator && npm run build -w packages/ticket-providers
scripts.build: npm run build:packages && npm run build -w apps/orchestrator && npm run build -w apps/worker-agent
scripts.start: npm run dev -w apps/orchestrator & npm run dev -w apps/worker-agent & wait
scripts.install:worker: npm run build:packages && npm run build -w apps/worker-agent && npm install -g ./apps/worker-agent
scripts.install:cli: npm run build:packages && npm run build -w apps/cli && npm install -g ./apps/cli
